pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against JDK 21 APIs and bytecode version; using JDK 17 settings prevents access to new language features and may cause compatibility issues with JDK 21 libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate Servlet API dependency from javax.servlet (Java EE) to jakarta.servlet (Jakarta EE 10).
pom.xml.why_exists: Tomcat 10.1+ and Jakarta EE 10 use the 'jakarta.*' namespace; the old 'javax.servlet' classes do not exist, causing compile errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JSTL API dependency from javax.servlet.jsp.jstl to jakarta.servlet.jsp.jstl.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old javax JSTL API is incompatible with Jakarta EE 10 containers; classes are missing, causing compile errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JSTL implementation dependency to Jakarta namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old javax JSTL implementation is incompatible with Jakarta EE 10; classes are missing, causing runtime or compile errors.
Hibernate 6.4.x is required for full compatibility with Jakarta Persistence 3.1 and JDK 21; older versions may lack necessary API support or have bugs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade PostgreSQL JDBC driver to version 42.7.1.
Upgrade Maven WAR plugin to version 3.4.0.
Remove JUnit Jupiter Engine test dependency.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Refactor DAO to use dependency injection for EntityManagerService instead of static utility calls.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.after: protected Dao(Class<T> clazz, EntityManagerService service) { this.clazz = clazz; this.service = service; }

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.general_idea: Replace static JpaUtil.createEntityManager() with service.createEntityManager() in readAll method.
Replace static JpaUtil.createEntityManager() with service.createEntityManager() in read method.
Replace static JpaUtil.createEntityManager() with service.createEntityManager() in create method.
Replace static JpaUtil.createEntityManager() with service.createEntityManager() in contains method.
Replace static JpaUtil.createEntityManager() with service.createEntityManager() in update method.
Replace static JpaUtil.createEntityManager() with service.createEntityManager() in delete method.
Simplify EntityManager closing logic by removing null checks since service always returns a valid instance.
Simplify EntityTransaction rollback logic by removing null checks since transaction is obtained from valid EntityManager.
Add Javadoc comments to class and methods for better documentation.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Dao.j.after: /** * CRUD operations for the entities in DAO */

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Added JPA annotations for automatic ID generation to the entity class.
Renamed the transient field 'transientNote' to 'note' for clarity.
Added a convenience constructor to the entity class.
Updated getter and setter methods to match the renamed field 'note'.
Updated the toString method to reflect the renamed field 'note'.
Refactor EntityManager lifecycle management to use a service provider instead of a static utility.
Update constructor to accept EntityManagerService for dependency injection.
Add Log4j2 logger field for tracing and error logging.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.after: private static final Logger log = LogManager.getLogger(EmployeeDao.class);

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Rename method readAllOrderBySalary to readBySalaryBottom and change logic to filter by salary limit.
Rename method readSalaryRange to readBySalaryRange and switch to named parameters.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.before: public List<Employee> readSalaryRange(double low, double high) { ... }
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.after: public List<Employee> readBySalaryRange(double low, double high) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Rename method readSalaryTop to readBySalaryTop and simplify query execution.
Add new method readByLastName to find employee by last name returning Optional.
Add new method deleteByIdBetween to perform bulk delete with transaction management.
src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.after: public int deleteByIdBetween(int low, int high) { ... }

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Emplo.general_idea: Add imports for Optional, Log4j, and JPA transaction/query classes.
Add Javadoc comments to class and methods.

src/main/java/com/example/jeed/dao/Regio.general_idea: Added import for java.util.Objects to support new equals/hashCode implementation.
Added class-level Javadoc comment describing the entity.
Implemented hashCode and equals methods using Objects.hash and Objects.equals for proper entity identity comparison.
Refactor DAO constructor to accept EntityManagerService dependency instead of relying on implicit lookup or default constructor.
